title: Intro to Meditation
description: Test your understanding of core meditation concepts and their benefits.

questions.text: What is mindfulness meditation primarily focused on?
How long should a beginner meditation session typically last?
What is the purpose of using an 'anchor' in meditation?
options: To give the mind something to return to when it wanders
To measure how long you've been meditating

questions.text: Which of these is a recognised benefit of regular meditation?
options: Reduced activity in the default mode network
Tensing and releasing each muscle group
Directing attention sequentially through parts of the body

questions.text: Which statement best describes the role of thoughts during meditation?
options: Thoughts are normal; gently return focus when you notice them
